_comment: ComfyUI API-format graph for character-consistent image generation via InstantID (SDXL): a reference face photo -> the same identity rendered into the scene/style of the prompt. Requires the InstantID custom node + its models installed on the ComfyUI box (InstantID file 'ip-adapter.bin' in models/instantid, ControlNet 'instantid_control.safetensors' in models/controlnet, and an InsightFace antelopev2 model for face analysis). Replace every <<token>>; numeric tokens (width/height/steps/cfg/weight/seed) MUST become real JSON numbers, not strings. Upload the reference face via POST /upload/image first and put the returned name into <<ref_image_name>>.
_defaults: width/height 1016 (deliberately off 1024 to avoid InstantID watermark artifacts); steps 30; cfg 4.5 (InstantID needs LOW cfg); weight 0.8 (identity strength, clamp 0..1); sampler euler / scheduler normal. checkpoint resolution: explicit -> comfy_checkpoint setting -> first available. Save outputs to the generated-images root, e.g. prefix studio/face-<timestamp>.
